article.description: — Thunder fans got everything they wanted on Tuesday — a ring ceremony, a championship banner unveiling and a win over ex-Oklahoma City star Kevin Durant and the Houston Rockets.
article.headline: Thunder celebrate ring ceremony, banner unveiling and double-OT win over Durant's Rockets

images.caption: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander hits a smooth jumper for the Thunder in overtime vs. the Rockets.
images.name: SGA knocks down big shot in OT for Thunder

article.linkText: Thunder celebrate ring ceremony, banner unveiling and double-OT win over Durant's Rockets
article.story: OKLAHOMA CITY -- — Thunder fans got everything they wanted on Tuesday — a ring ceremony, a championship banner unveiling and a win over ex-Oklahoma City star Kevin Durant and the Houston Rockets. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, the reigning MVP, hit two free throws with 2.3 seconds remaining in the second overtime to give the Thunder a 125-124 win. It was just the sixth time an opening night went to double overtime and the first time since 2005. Gilgeous-Alexander, last season’s scoring champion, had just five points at halftime but finished with 35. Thunder fans still haven’t forgiven Durant for leaving the Thunder in 2016 to join the Golden State Warriors, their biggest rival at the time. Durant had 23 points and nine rebounds in his first game with Houston after being traded in the offseason. He was booed loudly during pregame starter introductions, and that continued for much of the game. Durant fouled Gilgeous-Alexander with the Rockets leading 124-123 in the second extra period. The crowd cheered as Durant exited the game with his sixth personal foul. Gilgeous-Alexander made both free throws for the decisive points. Houston's Jabari Smith Jr. missed a 19-foot jumper as time expired, and the Thunder survived in the season opener for both teams. Chet Holmgren added 28 points and seven rebounds for the Thunder. Ajay Mitchell added 16 points, including a four-point play with one second left in the first half. Oklahoma City’s Jalen Williams, a first-time All-Star last season, sat out as he continues to recover from a right wrist injury he sustained last season. He had surgery on July 1, and coach Mark Daigneault said he is “progressing.” Alperen Sengun had 39 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists for the Rockets. He made a career-high five 3-pointers. Gilgeous-Alexander’s short jumper with 2.1 seconds remaining in the fourth quarter tied the game at 104. Sengun missed a fadeaway at the buzzer to send the game into overtime. With the score tied at 115 in the closing seconds of the first overtime, Gilgeous-Alexander missed and Durant rebounded and tried to call a timeout that the Rockets didn’t have. The Thunder noticed and tried to alert the officials, but no call was made and the game went to a second overtime. Crew chief Zach Zarba said after the game that none of the three officials saw Durant call the timeout, so it was not granted. Up next The Rockets visit the Detroit Pistons on Friday. The Thunder visit the Indiana Pacers on Thursday in a rematch of last season’s NBA Finals series the Thunder won in seven games. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.

videos.description: The Thunder prevail on ring night with a hard-fought victory over the Rockets in double overtime.
videos.headline: Thunder, Rockets open NBA season with 2OT thriller

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Thunder, Rockets open NBA season with 2OT thriller) 2025/10/21 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder unveil and raise the banner commemorating their first NBA championship.
videos.headline: The Thunder raise their first NBA championship banner

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Misc. (The Thunder raise their first NBA championship banner) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren gets the hoop and the harm to get his first points of the 2025-26 NBA season.
videos.headline: Chet Holmgren lays in and-1 bucket for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Holmgren lays in and-1 bucket for Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Amen Thompson floats in an and-1 bucket for the Rockets vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: Amen Thompson gets and-1 to fall for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson gets and-1 to fall for Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Amen Thompson gets another and-1 bucket to fall for the Rockets vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: Amen Thompson sinks the and-1 for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson sinks the and-1 for Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Lu Dort spins past his defender and lays in a nice bucket for the Thunder vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Lu Dort spins in for nice Thunder bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Lu Dort spins in for nice Thunder bucket) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant gets a smooth midrange to fall for the Rockets vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: KD drills midrange bucket for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD drills midrange bucket for Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander makes a nice block at the rim for the Thunder vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: SGA sends the shot away for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA sends the shot away for Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren lays in the and-1 bucket for the Thunder vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Chet Holmgren sinks and-1 for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Holmgren sinks and-1 for Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Reed Sheppard pulls up from deep and hits a 3 for the Rockets vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: Reed Sheppard drills deep 3 for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reed Sheppard drills deep 3 for Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Ajay Mitchell is fouled as he hits a 3 for the Thunder vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Ajay Mitchell splashes a 3 and-1 for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ajay Mitchell splashes a 3 and-1 for Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Amen Thompson shows off the muscle after his layup forces a Thunder timeout.
videos.headline: Amen Thompson flexes after forcing a Thunder timeout with layup

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson flexes after forcing a Thunder timeout with layup) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Alex Caruso comes up with a steal and throws it down for the Thunder vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Alex Caruso throws it down for the Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Alex Caruso throws it down for the Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Aaron Wiggins drives to the paint and throws the hammer down for the Thunder vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: Aaron Wiggins throws down big slam for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Aaron Wiggins throws down big slam for Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Alperen Sengun banks in a ridiculous and-1 shot for the Rockets vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: Alperen Sengun banks in and-1 bucket for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Alperen Sengun banks in and-1 bucket for Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander drains a huge bucket to bring the Thunder level with two seconds left vs. the Rockets.
videos.headline: SGA hits clutch bucket to tie it up late for Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA hits clutch bucket to tie it up late for Thunder) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: The Thunder prevail in double overtime after Jabari Smith Jr.'s turnaround jumper doesn't go in for the Rockets.
videos.headline: Jabari Smith Jr.'s turnaround jumper no good in 2OT for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jabari Smith Jr.'s turnaround jumper no good in 2OT for Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander goes off for 35 points to power the Thunder to a narrow double overtime victory over the Rockets.
videos.headline: SGA drops 35 in Thunder's 2OT win over Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA drops 35 in Thunder's 2OT win over Rockets) 2025/10/21 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant grabs the rebound and appears to signal for a timeout without any available as time expires in overtime to the protest of the Thunder.
videos.headline: KD appears to signal timeout with none left for Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD appears to signal timeout with none left for Rockets) 2025/10/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander hits the clutch free throws to win it for OKC after he was fouled by Kevin Durant.
videos.headline: KD fouls out, SGA hits game-winning free throws

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD fouls out, SGA hits game-winning free throws) 2025/10/22 ESHEET
